dct_title_s: Students' map of Palestine : for tourists of Palestine, adult Bible classes, all Bible teachers showing all the most interesting places in Old and New Testament, including the journeys and deeds of Jesus, also the very spot where many most interesting events took place
dct_description_sm: arranged in chronological order by Andrew P. Stout ; copyright by C.D. Meigs.
Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Bar scale on map given in "Miles".
Shows topography, drainage, settlements of the tribes of Israel, travel routes and distances, places of historical interest.
Descriptive text throughout, e.g.: Gospel accurancy...
Includes legend: Explanation; index: Itinerary and texts.
Margins are numbered 1 to 30 and A to T.
